title: Khartoum North Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khartoum North with extreme temperatures. The Z-Score of +7.31 indicates a highly unusual event.
body:
The heat wave has brought extremely high temperatures to Khartoum North, with a score of 10.0/10 indicating a critical level. 
 The low humidity of 10% and gentle wind of 4.4 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The high CDD of 24.6 GG and zero HDD indicate a significant energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
